name: NORTECH SYSTEMS INC
business: Nortech Systems Incorporated is a provider of engineering design and manufacturing solutions for complex electromedical devices, electromechanical systems, assemblies and components. The company serves original equipment manufacturers in the Medical Device, Medical Imaging, Aerospace and Defense, and Industrial markets.

exposures.sentence: Our manufacturing and engineering services include complex electromedical and electromechanical products including medical devices, wire and cable assemblies, printed circuit board assemblies, complex higher-level assemblies and other box builds for a wide range of industries.
Our customers are original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) in the Medical Device, Medical Imaging, Aerospace and Defense, and Industrial markets.
We have also invested in fiber optic technologies to provide a lighter weight, data-driven and environmentally cleaner solution to our customers.

catalysts.event: Entered into new credit facility with Associated Bank
catalysts.sentence: On March 20, 2026, we entered into a new Credit and Security Agreement with Associated Bank, National Association, which provides for a revolving credit facility of up to $15.0 million, subject to a borrowing base based on eligible accounts receivable and inventory, and a $2.2 million term loan (the Associated Facility).
